seed_rate.notes: 12-15 kg/ha of seeds is optimal; higher rates for late-sown crops.

sowing.soil_conditions: Well-drained deep loamy soils with pH 6.5-7.5. Avoid fields prone to flooding.

irrigation.notes: First critical moisture stage. Water stress reduces flower clusters.
Ensure adequate soil moisture to prevent seed shriveling inside pods.

fertilizer.method: Fertilizer drilling at seed placement line
fertilizer.notes: Rhizobium and Phosphate Solubilizing Bacteria (PSB) seed inoculation is advised.

maturity_indicators: More than 80% of pods turn light brown and dry up
Pods rattle when shaken indicating dry seeds inside
harvest.harvest_method: Cutting plants close to ground and stacking them for sun drying
harvest.notes: Dry harvested plants for 1 week, then thresh by beating with sticks or using mechanical thrashers.
